member.name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotFromBehindHelper.SfbIgnoreFail
member.summary: 0 = balancer fails as normal, 1 = ignore backArchedBack and leanedTooFarBack balancer failures, 2 = ignore backArchedBack balancer failure only, 3 = ignore leanedTooFarBack balancer failure only.
member.remarks: Default value = 0. Min value = 0. Max value = 3.
